title: EasyMOTD
description: Flexible MOTD settings for your server
body:
**EasyMOTD** is a powerful and easy-to-use Minecraft plugin that provides flexible tools for customizing your server's MOTD and icons. Ideal for any type of server, this plugin offers simple and effective tools for creating a unique and memorable experience for your players.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bafd1dc2ef97d25d71bd69bdc526dd8e88a8d165.jpeg)

# Key Features:
- **Random MOTDs:**
Add multiple MOTD options that will rotate randomly every time the server list is refreshed.

- **Timed MOTDs:**
Set MOTDs based on the time of day. For example, display an evening message from 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM, and a night message from 10:00 PM to 6:00 AM.

- **Flexible Icon Configuration:**
Assign a unique icon for each MOTD, or enable a random selection mode to pick an icon from the available files in the icons folder.

- **Color Support:**
Use standard color codes (&) and HEX codes (&#RRGGBB) to create vibrant and visually appealing messages.

- **Fake Online Count:**
Display a custom maximum player count on the server list.

- **Easy Configuration Reload:**
The /easymotd reload command allows you to quickly update the settings without restarting the server. (**easymotd.reload**)

- **Gradient:**
Add gradient to your MOTD without any additional programs.

```
<gradient:#FF4500:#FFD700>Join us now!</gradient>
```

- **Icon size:**
Now your icon size does not have to be exactly 64x64 pixels, as the plugin will automatically resize your image to the required size.

## Why Choose EasyMOTD?
1. **Ease of Use**: Simple configuration, even for beginners.
2. **Flexibility**: Support for random MOTDs, time-based schedules, and custom icons.
3. **Visual Appeal**: HEX colors and customizable message styles.
4. **Performance**: Optimized code with minimal impact on server performance.
